layoutSelect.heading: Choose a layout
layoutSelect.subheading: Select how your photos will be arranged on the strip.

modeSelect.heading: How would you like to add photos?
modeSelect.cameraDescription: Use your camera to shoot photos with a countdown timer.
modeSelect.uploadDescription: Pick existing photos from your device.

instructions.heading: Before you shoot
instructions.body1: A countdown will appear before each shot — no retakes.
instructions.body2: You may shoot more photos than needed for the strip, then select which photos to use for your strip.
instructions.body3: Then you may edit your strip and download or share your strip with friends.

capture.noCamera: No camera found. Please choose to upload photos instead.

select.heading: Choose your photos
select.subheadingOne: Select {required} photo in the order you want them on the strip.
select.subheadingMany: Select {required} photos in the order you want them on the strip.

upload.heading: Upload your photos
upload.subheading: Upload at least {slotCount} photos to fill your {cols}×{rows} strip.
upload.minPhotosError: Please upload at least {slotCount} photos to fill your {cols}×{rows} strip.
upload.adjustTip: On the next page you can drag each photo left or right to adjust the crop, and scroll (or pinch on mobile) to zoom in or out.

edit.clickToPlace: — click on the strip to place
edit.shareConfirmBody1: Your photo strip will be uploaded to the cloud and anyone with the link will be able to view and download it.
edit.shareConfirmBody2: The link will be available for 30 days, after which it will expire.
edit.shareResultBody: Anyone with this link can view and download your photo strip for the next 30 days. You can also scan the QR code below with your camera to access.
